facade_description: 260 Augusta Ave presents a converted house-form, semi-detached facade within the Kensington Market HCD. The street elevation spans roughly 5.2 metres across 2 storeys and is capped by a cross-gable, consistent with its converted house-form, semi-detached typology. The facade reads primarily as brick, laid in running bond with light grey mortar joints. The facade keeps a domestic opening rhythm of 5, 8 window bays from lower to upper levels, using fixed, and 2 principal entrances. Character-defining facade elements include cornice. HCD note: The property has value as a House-form building that has been modified to accommodate a commercial conversion.
